resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: A serving route is incorrectly accepted because aggregate throughput is treated as quality and lower risk.
resource_budget_record.capacity_pool: serving memory accounting fixture for KV-cache and batching records
cost_estimate: KV-cache page reuse lowers aggregate serving memory pressure
resource_budget_record.quality_predicate: Aggregate throughput proves model quality and proves lower single-request risk.
residuals: No separate single-request verified output needed because throughput proves quality.

non_claims: Does not promote any support state.
Does not prove scheduler behavior, runtime behavior, load stability, KV-cache behavior, serving throughput, or economic outcomes.
